metadata.description: Adversarial negative scoring: variants pathogenic in OTHER diseases but NOT brain metastasis drivers
metadata.scoring_note: delta_ll = ll(alt) - ll(ref). Negative = model penalizes alt (damaging). Positive = model tolerates alt (benign-like).

original_grin2a_dropped.reason: GRIN2A R844C: no ClinVar entry; canonical transcripts ENST00000330684 and ENST00000396573 both have Lys (AAG) not Arg at position 844; coordinate unresolvable
original_grin2a_dropped.replacement: PTPN11 E76K (ClinVar RCV001254876, confirmed pathogenic in Noonan/JMML)

summary.honest_note: PTPN11 E76K delta_ll=+0.005 is within noise (|delta_ll| < 0.05); model is genuinely ambiguous. NF1 R1276Q (+0.314) and FAT1 Q3044* (-0.308) show strong signal.

variants.disease_context: Noonan syndrome / JMML (RASopathy); NOT a brain metastasis driver
variants.interpretation: Model ambiguous (delta_ll near zero). Does not strongly flag as damaging, consistent with not being a BrM driver. Weak concordance.

variants.disease_context: Somatic in colorectal/gastric cancer; weak BrM evidence
Neurofibromatosis type 1 LOF; not a BrM-specific driver
variants.interpretation: Strong positive delta_ll: model tolerates this variant. NF1 is 8500 aa; single missense may not strongly perturb 8kb context. Strong concordance.

variants.disease_context: FAT1 truncating stop-gain; somatic in multiple cancers but not a BrM panel positive
variants.clinvar: Not in ClinVar; stop codon expected to be damaging
variants.interpretation: Strong negative delta_ll: model correctly penalizes stop codon. FAT1 is not in the 29-gene BrM panel, so composite classifier scores it low regardless.
